debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
t_seq : Fin (K + 2) → ℝ
ht0 : t_seq 0 = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
htK : t_seq (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T
ht_incr : StrictMono t_seq
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T * x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq 0))) / t_seq 0 ∧
    FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤
      2 *
          ∑ k ∈ Finset.Ioo 0 (Fin.last (K + 1)),
            riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k) *
              (x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (k - 1)))) / t_seq (k - 1) -
                x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq k))) / t_seq k) +
        x ^ (-1 / (FKS.Inputs.R I * log (t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc))) / t_seq (Fin.last K).castSucc *
          riemannZeta.N' σ₂ T

failed_attempts:
let g (t : ℝ) := x^(-1 / (I.R * log t)) / t
  have h_bound : riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ 2 * ∑ k in Finset.range (K + 1), (riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq (k + 1)) - riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq k)) * g (t_seq k) := by
    -- The sum over zeroes is bounded by the discretized sum using the monotonicity of g and the zero-free region
    sorry
  constructor
  · -- First inequality: follows from monotonicity of g and h_bound
    apply le_trans h_bound
    sorry 
  · -- Second inequality: algebraic rearrangement (Abel summation)
    apply le_trans h_bound
    -- We transform ∑ (N_{k+1} - N_k) g_k into boundary terms and sum of N_k (g_{k-1} - g_k)
    -- Using the fact that N(t_seq 0) = 0 (since t_seq 0 ≥ Hσ and Hσ is zero-free start)
    have hN0 : riemannZeta.N' σ₂ (t_seq 0) = 0 := by
      apply riemannZeta.Hσ_zeroes I.H₀ I.R σ₂ I.hH₀ I.hR
      rw [ht0]; apply le_max_left
    -- The RHS matches the rearranged sum
    sorry
